mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate below 1.0% signals monetary easing that reduces equity discount rates and increases present value of future corporate earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns when FEDFUNDS < 1.0% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Monthly payroll employment growth decelerates below 100,000 net new jobs, signaling weakening labor demand and reduced consumer spending capacity, which compresses forward equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: PAYEMS month-over-month change falls below 100,000 persons
regime_hint: late-cycle expansion with labor market softening
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite payroll deceleration, or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A joint contraction in retail sales (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) signals weakening aggregate demand and consumer confidence, which reduces forward earnings expectations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: RSAFS and HOUST both decline month-over-month simultaneously
regime_hint: demand-side recession or sharp demand shock
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of co-triggered instances, or the interaction term (RSAFS × HOUST) exhibits Rank IC < 0.04 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production (INDPRO) accelerates above its 12-month trend, signaling robust supply-side capacity utilization and pricing power, which supports forward equity earnings and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns when INDPRO growth > 0.5% are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05), or Rank IC < 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: When the federal funds rate rises above 2.5% while inflation (CPIAUCSL) remains elevated above 3.0% year-over-year, the Fed is in restrictive tightening mode that compresses equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
regime_hint: monetary tightening cycle with persistent inflation
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of co-triggered instances, or the interaction term exhibits Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: The unemployment rate (UNRATE) rises above 5.5%, signaling a deteriorating labor market that reduces consumer confidence and discretionary spending, which compresses forward equity valuations and produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
regime_hint: labor market deterioration or early-stage recession
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20-day returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite elevated unemployment, or Rank IC < 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts (HOUST) accelerate above 1,200 thousand units annualized, signaling robust residential investment demand and forward economic growth expectations, which supports forward equity earnings and produces positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns show no significant correlation with HOUST levels (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Real GDP growth (GDPC1) decelerates below 1.5% annualized, signaling weakening economic momentum that reduces forward earnings expectations and equity valuations, which produces negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 quarter-over-quarter annualized growth falls below 1.5%
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60-day returns in > 55% of triggered instances despite GDP deceleration, or Rank IC < 0.04 over any 3-year rolling window.
